names.name: Marco
names.origin: Latin, derived from Martius (of Mars the god of war)
names.meaning: Dedicated to Mars, symbolizing strength and warfare

names.name: Giovanni
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Yohanan via Latin Ioannes
names.meaning: God is gracious, expressing divine favor

names.name: Antonio
names.origin: Latin Antonius, of uncertain Etruscan or Roman origin

names.name: Giuseppe
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Yosef via Latin Josephus
names.meaning: God will increase, expressing prosperity and growth

names.name: Francesco
names.origin: Italian form of Latin Franciscus, meaning of the Franks
names.meaning: Free man, symbol of liberty and virtue

names.name: Luca
names.origin: Latin Lucanus, from Lucania in southern Italy
names.meaning: From Lucania or bringing light and clarity

names.name: Andrea
names.origin: Greek Andreas, derived from andros (man)
names.meaning: Strong and manly, representing masculine virtue

names.name: Paolo
names.origin: Italian form of Latin Paulus, meaning small

names.name: Riccardo
names.origin: Germanic Richard via Italian, from ric (ruler) and hard (hardy)
names.meaning: Powerful ruler, symbolizing strength and leadership

names.name: Michele
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Michael via Greek
names.meaning: Who is like God, expressing divine power

names.name: Giorgio
names.origin: Italian form of Greek Georgios, from georgos (farmer)
names.meaning: Farmer or earth-worker, symbolizing labor and cultivation

names.name: Matteo
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Mattiyahu via Greek Matthaeus
names.meaning: Gift of God, expressing divine blessing

names.name: Davide
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew David, meaning beloved
names.meaning: Beloved one, expressing affection and favor

names.name: Filippo
names.origin: Italian form of Greek Philippos, from philos (friend) and hippos (horse)
names.meaning: Lover of horses, symbolizing nobility and skill

names.name: Carlo
names.origin: Italian form of Germanic Charles, from carl (man)
names.meaning: Free man or manly person, expressing autonomy

names.name: Vincenzo
names.origin: Italian form of Latin Vincentius, from vincere (to conquer)

names.name: Stefano
names.origin: Italian form of Greek Stephanos, from stephanos (crown)
names.meaning: Crowned one, expressing honor and dignity

names.name: Massimo
names.origin: Italian form of Latin Maximus, meaning greatest
names.meaning: The greatest, symbolizing excellence and superiority

names.name: Fabio
names.origin: Latin Fabius, from faba (bean), name of Roman patrician family
names.meaning: Farmer or of the Fabius clan, expressing cultivation

names.name: Bruno
names.origin: Germanic Brueno, from brun (brown)

names.name: Rosa
names.origin: Latin rosa, the flower name
names.meaning: Rose, symbolizing beauty, love, and purity

names.name: Maria
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Miriam via Latin
names.meaning: Of the sea or beloved, expressing grace and mystery

names.name: Anna
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Hannah, meaning grace
names.meaning: Grace and favor, symbolizing kindness and blessing

names.name: Francesca
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Francesco, meaning of the Franks
names.meaning: Free woman, expressing liberty and independence

names.name: Caterina
names.origin: Italian form of Greek Katharos via Latin Catharina, meaning pure
names.meaning: Pure and clear, symbolizing virtue and clarity

names.name: Giulia
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Julius, from Latin Iulius
names.meaning: Youthful one, symbolizing vitality and freshness

names.name: Lucia
names.origin: Italian form of Latin Lucia, from lux (light)

names.name: Alessandra
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Alexander, from Greek (defender of men)

names.name: Elisabetta
names.origin: Italian form of Hebrew Elisheba via Greek Elisabeth
names.meaning: God is my oath, expressing divine covenant

names.name: Silvia
names.origin: Latin Silvia, from silva (forest)
names.meaning: Of the forest, symbolizing nature and wilderness

names.name: Martina
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Latin Martinus (of Mars)
names.meaning: Warlike one or dedicated to Mars

names.name: Cristina
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Latin Christinus (of Christ)
names.meaning: Follower of Christ, expressing Christian faith

names.name: Daniela
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Daniel, from Hebrew (God is my judge)
names.meaning: God is my judge, expressing divine justice

names.name: Valentina
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Latin Valentinus, from valens (strong)
names.meaning: Strong and vigorous, symbolizing health and vitality

names.name: Federica
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Germanic Frederick, from frid (peace) and ric (ruler)
names.meaning: Peaceful ruler, symbolizing harmony and leadership

names.name: Veronica
names.origin: Latin name, possibly from vera (true) and icon (image)
names.meaning: True image, referencing Saint Veronica of Christian tradition

names.name: Rafaella
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Hebrew Raphael via Italian (God heals)
names.meaning: God heals, expressing divine healing and wholeness

names.name: Bianca
names.origin: Italian feminine form of Latin Biancus, meaning white
names.meaning: White or pure, symbolizing innocence and clarity

names.name: Leonardo
names.origin: Late Latin Leonardus, from leo (lion) and hardus (hardy)
names.meaning: Bold lion, symbolizing courage and strength

names.name: Tommaso
names.origin: Italian form of Aramaic Thomas, meaning twin

names.name: Alberto
names.origin: Germanic

names.name: Alice
names.origin: Germanic

names.name: Angelo
names.origin: Greek

names.name: Beatrice
names.origin: Latin

names.origin: Latin

names.origin: Latin

names.origin: Spanish/Italian

names.origin: Latin

names.origin: Greek

names.origin: Greek

names.origin: Germanic

names.name: Federico
names.origin: Germanic

names.origin: Hebrew

names.name: Gianluca
names.origin: Italian

names.origin: Italian

names.origin: Latin

names.origin: Latin

names.origin: Germanic

names.origin: Hebrew

names.origin: Hebrew

names.origin: Greek

names.origin: Greek

names.origin: Germanic

names.origin: Latin

names.origin: Latin

names.name: Alba
names.origin: Latin

names.name: Aldo
names.origin: Germanic

names.name: Cesare
names.origin: Latin

names.name: Cristian
names.origin: Latin

names.name: Diana
names.origin: Latin

names.name: Edoardo
names.origin: Germanic

names.name: Emiliano
names.origin: Latin

names.name: Fabrizio
names.origin: Latin

names.name: Flavia
names.origin: Latin

names.name: Greta
names.origin: Germanic

names.name: Iacopo
names.origin: Hebrew

names.name: Letizia
names.origin: Latin

names.name: Luigia
names.origin: Germanic

names.name: Marta
names.origin: Aramaic

names.name: Nina
names.origin: Spanish/Italian

names.name: Renato
names.origin: Latin

names.name: Salvatore
names.origin: Latin

names.name: Sara
names.origin: Hebrew

names.name: Sofia
names.origin: Greek

names.name: Valeria
names.origin: Latin

names.name: Aldina
names.origin: Derived from the Germanic name Aldo, which means 'old' or 'wise'.
names.meaning: A feminine form related to wisdom and age.

names.name: Beppo
names.origin: A diminutive form of Giuseppe, rooted in Hebrew meaning 'God will increase'.
names.meaning: A common nickname for those named Giuseppe, conveying familiarity.

names.name: Carmina
names.origin: A Latin name derived from 'carmen', meaning 'song' or 'poem'.

names.name: Domenica
names.origin: Derived from the Latin 'Dominica' meaning 'of the Lord'.
names.meaning: Traditionally associated with Sunday and religious connotations.

names.name: Elvio
names.origin: Of Latin origin, possibly derived from Elvius, an ancient Roman family name.

names.name: Fiorenza
names.origin: Derived from the Italian word 'fiore' meaning 'flower'.

names.name: Giorgetta
names.origin: A diminutive derived from Giorgio, which means 'farmer' or 'earth worker'.
names.meaning: A familiar form of Giorgio, representing home and agriculture.

names.name: Helena
names.origin: Rooted in Greek, associated with Helen, meaning 'torch' or 'light'.

names.name: Ippolito
names.origin: Derived from the Greek name Hippolytos meaning 'horse-rearer'.

names.name: Lorenza
names.origin: Feminine form of Lorenzo, derived from 'laurel', a symbol of victory.
names.meaning: Conveys ideas of triumph and celebration.

names.name: Marcello
names.origin: Latin origin, meaning 'young warrior'.

names.name: Niccolò
names.origin: Italian form of Nicholas, with Greek roots meaning 'victory of the people'.
names.meaning: Symbolizes triumph and popularity among the community.

names.name: Oriana
names.origin: From the Latin 'aureus', meaning 'golden'.

names.name: Pietrina
names.origin: A diminutive of Pietra, which comes from Latin meaning 'stone'.

names.name: Quirino
names.origin: Derived from the Latin name Quirinus, a name of an ancient god.
names.meaning: Represents protection and strength in community.

names.name: Rinaldo
names.origin: Of Germanic origin, meaning 'ruler' or 'counsel'.

names.name: Silvano
names.origin: Derived from the Latin 'silvanus', meaning 'of the forest'.
names.meaning: Associated with nature and the wilderness.

names.name: Tiziana
names.origin: Feminine form of Tiziano, deriving from the Latin Tizianus.

names.name: Ugo
names.origin: Derived from the Germanic name Hug, meaning 'heart' or 'mind'.
names.meaning: Symbolizes intelligence and a strong character.

names.name: Vera
names.origin: Of Latin origin, meaning 'truth'.

names.name: Zeno
names.origin: Derived from the Greek name Zenon, meaning 'gift of Zeus'.

names.name: Agostino
names.origin: Derived from Augustus, meaning 'great' or 'venerable'.

names.name: Benedetta
names.origin: Feminine form of Benedetto, meaning 'blessed'.
names.meaning: Symbolizes good fortune and divine favor.

names.name: Clemente
names.origin: Derived from Latin, meaning 'merciful' or 'gentle'.

names.name: Dario
names.origin: Of Persian origin, meaning 'possessor of goodness'.
names.meaning: Conveys notions of wealth and generosity.

names.name: Emanuela
names.origin: Feminine form of Emanuele, meaning 'God is with us'.

names.name: Flavio
names.origin: Latin origin, meaning 'yellow' or 'golden'.

names.name: Gilda
names.origin: Of Germanic origin, associated with the meaning 'sacrifice'.

names.name: Hildegarda
names.origin: Derived from Old High German, meaning 'battle' and 'protection'.

names.name: Ilario
names.origin: Derived from Latin, meaning 'cheerful' or 'joyful'.

names.name: Morena
names.origin: Of Latin and Portuguese origin, meaning 'dark-skinned'.
names.meaning: Conveys beauty and uniqueness of diversity.

names.name: Nerina
names.origin: Of Greek origin, associated with the sea, meaning 'sea nymph'.
names.meaning: Symbolizes beauty and mystery of the ocean.

names.name: Oronzo
names.origin: Derived from the Latin name Orontius, meaning 'to rise'.

names.name: Palladio
names.origin: Derived from the Greek word 'pallas', meaning 'wisdom'.

names.name: Quinto
names.origin: From Latin, meaning 'fifth'.
names.meaning: Often associated with birth order or family lineage.

names.name: Renata
names.origin: Of Latin origin, meaning 'reborn'.
names.meaning: Conveys themes of renewal and freshness.

names.name: Santino
names.origin: Diminutive form derived from Santo, meaning 'holy'.

names.name: Teodoro
names.origin: Derived from Greek, meaning 'gift of God'.

names.name: Ursula
names.origin: Of Latin origin, meaning 'little bear'.

names.name: Vittore
names.origin: Derived from Latin, meaning 'conqueror' or 'victor'.

names.name: Zita
names.origin: Of Italian origin, meaning 'pledge' or 'promise'.

names.name: Valerio
names.origin: Derived from Latin, meaning strong or healthy.

names.name: Ginevra
names.origin: Italian form of Guinevere, found in Arthurian legends.

names.name: Giovanna
names.origin: Feminine form of Giovanni, meaning God is gracious.

names.name: Rocco
names.origin: Derived from Germanic languages, meaning rest or refuge.

names.name: Serafina
names.origin: Derived from Hebrew, meaning fiery or burning one.

names.name: Alessio
names.origin: Italian form of Alexis, derived from Greek.

names.name: Ottavia
names.origin: Derived from Latin, meaning the eighth.

names.name: Giuliana
names.origin: Feminine form of Julian, derived from Latin.

names.name: Ernesto
names.origin: Derived from Germanic, meaning serious or battle to earn.

names.name: Vittoriana
names.origin: Feminine form of Vittorio, rooted in Latin.

names.name: Luciano
names.origin: Italian form of Lucianus, derived from Latin for light.

names.name: Emilia
names.origin: Derived from Latin Aemilia, meaning rival or eager.

names.name: Taddeo
names.origin: Italian form of Thaddeus, of Aramaic origin.

names.name: Isabella
names.origin: Of Hebrew and Spanish origin, meaning God is my oath.

names.name: Ferdinando
names.origin: Italian form of Ferdinand, derived from Gothic roots.

names.name: Aurelia
names.origin: Feminine form of Aurelius, derived from Latin for golden.

names.name: Samuele
names.origin: Italian variant of Samuel, meaning God has heard.

names.name: Marzio
names.origin: Derived from Mars, the Roman god of war.

names.name: Claudio
names.origin: From Latin Claudius, meaning lame or closed.

names.name: Alina
names.origin: Of Slavic roots, meaning bright or shining light.

names.name: Guido
names.origin: Derived from Germanic, meaning guide or leader.

names.name: Gemma
names.origin: From Latin, meaning jewel or gem.

names.name: Salvo
names.origin: Short form of Salvatore, meaning savior.

names.name: Noemi
names.origin: From Hebrew, meaning pleasantness or delight.

names.name: Alonzo
names.origin: Of Spanish and Gothic origin, meaning noble and ready.

names.name: Biagio
names.origin: Italian form of Blaise, derived from Latin meaning stammerer.

names.name: Cosimo
names.origin: Derived from Greek, meaning order or beauty.

names.name: Lia
names.origin: Shortened form of names like Amelia, meaning weary or delicate.

names.name: Amedeo
names.origin: Derived from the Gothic elements meaning 'strength' and 'power'.
names.meaning: One who is loved by God.

names.name: Cecilia
names.origin: Latin origin, associated with the name of the patroness of music.
names.meaning: Blind and devoid of things; often associated with music and harmony.

names.name: Dante
names.origin: A derivative of 'Durante', which means 'enduring' or 'steadfast'.
names.meaning: Enduring or steadfast, often associated with the poet Dante Alighieri.

names.name: Irene
names.origin: Greek origin, meaning 'peace'.

names.name: Mirella
names.origin: Of uncertain origin, possibly derived from Latin or Hebrew meanings.

names.name: Ottavio
names.origin: From Latin, meaning 'eighth'.
names.meaning: The eighth-born child in a family.

names.name: Paola
names.origin: Derived from the Latin name Paulus, meaning 'small' or 'humble'.
names.meaning: Small or humble, often connoted with simplicity.

names.name: Quintilio
names.origin: Derived from Latin meaning 'the fifth'.

names.name: Raffaella
names.origin: Feminine form of Raffaele, Hebrew in origin, meaning 'God has healed'.

names.name: Tatiana
names.origin: Of Russian origin, it is adopted in Italy and holds no specific Italian meaning.
names.meaning: Fairy queen, often a regal name.

names.name: Umberto
names.origin: From Germanic origins, meaning 'bright warrior'.
names.meaning: Bright warrior or army; often a strong name.

names.name: Virginia
names.origin: Latin origin, possibly meaning 'pure' or 'virgin'.
names.meaning: Pure or chaste, a name held by many saints.

names.name: Ariana
names.origin: Derived from the Greek or Latin meaning 'sacred'.

names.name: Desdemona
names.origin: Greek origin, meaning 'ill-fated' or 'unlucky'.
names.meaning: Ill-fated or unlucky, famously known in Shakespeare's Othello.

names.name: Ettore
names.origin: Italian form of Hector, meaning 'holding fast'.
names.meaning: One who holds fast; a hero in Trojan lore.

names.name: Horatio
names.origin: Latin origin, potentially derived from 'hour'.
names.meaning: Of time; indicated a historical significance.

names.name: Ignazio
names.origin: Latin origin, meaning 'fiery' or 'ardent'.

names.name: Livia
names.origin: Latin origin, possibly meaning 'blue' or 'envious'.
names.meaning: Blue or the envious one; a historic feminine name.

names.name: Maddalena
names.origin: The Italian form of Magdalene, meaning 'of Magdala'.
names.meaning: Woman from Magdala; associated with the figure of Mary Magdalene.

names.name: Nico
names.origin: Short form of Nicola, derived from Greek meaning 'victory of the people'.

names.name: Ornella
names.origin: Possibly derived from the Latin meaning 'flowering'.
names.meaning: Flowering or blossoming; associated with beauty.

names.name: Pavlo
names.origin: Italian form of Paul, derived from the Latin meaning 'small' or 'humble'.

names.name: Quinn
names.origin: Anglicized form of a Gaelic surname, adopted in Italy too.

names.name: Ruggero
names.origin: Italian variation of Roger, meaning 'famous spear'.

names.name: Tania
names.origin: Derived from the Russian diminutive of Tatiana, common in Italy.

names.name: Umfredo
names.origin: Italian form of Aldrich, meaning 'wise ruler'.

names.name: Viviana
names.origin: Derived from Latin meaning 'alive' or 'vibrant'.
names.meaning: Lively or vibrant; evokes joy of life.

names.name: Benedetto
names.origin: Derived from the Latin name Benedictus, meaning 'blessed'.

names.name: Emilio
names.origin: From the Latin name Aemilius, meaning 'rival'.

names.name: Mariangela
names.origin: A combination of Maria and Angela, meaning 'messenger of God'.

names.name: Nicolina
names.origin: Derived from the Greek Nikolaos, meaning 'victory of the people'.

names.name: Raffaele
names.origin: Italian form of Raphael, from Hebrew meaning 'God has healed'.

names.name: Samantha
names.origin: Of uncertain origin, possibly derived from Samuel, meaning 'heard by God'.

names.name: Tiziano
names.origin: From the Latin Tizianus, meaning 'the one from the Tizian family'.
names.meaning: One belonging to the Tizian family.

names.name: Venere
names.origin: From Latin meaning 'love' or 'goddess of love'.

names.name: Zaira
names.origin: Derived from Arabic, meaning 'flower' or 'blossom'.

names.name: Allegra
names.origin: From the Italian word for 'joyful' or 'cheerful'.

names.name: Daria
names.origin: From Persian meaning 'possessor of goodness'.

names.name: Orsino
names.origin: Possibly derived from the Latin for 'bear'.

names.name: Rinalda
names.origin: Of Germanic origin, meaning 'counsel power'.

names.name: Sergio
names.origin: Of uncertain origin, possibly Etruscan or Latin, meaning 'to rise'.

names.name: Teodora
names.origin: Feminine form of Theodore, meaning 'gift of God'.

names.name: Umberta
names.origin: Feminine form of Umberto, from Germanic meaning 'warrior'.

names.name: Ylenia
names.origin: Possibly derived from Greek meaning 'light'.

names.name: Zelda
names.origin: Of Yiddish origin, meaning 'blessed or happy'.

names.name: Alessia
names.origin: Derived from the Greek name Alexander, popular in Italy.

names.name: Cecilio
names.origin: Italian form of the Latin name Caecilius, used from antiquity.
names.meaning: Blind, referring to clarity of the heart.

names.name: Dalila
names.origin: Of Hebrew origin, but commonly used in Italy.

names.name: Fabiana
names.origin: Derived from the Latin name Fabianus, used in Italy since the Roman times.
names.meaning: Bean grower, symbolizing sustenance and growth.

names.name: Giordano
names.origin: From the Hebrew word 'Yarden', meaning to descend, commonly used in Italy.

names.name: Nicolò
names.origin: Italian short form of Nicholas, derived from the Greek name Nikolaos.
names.meaning: Victory of the people, symbolizing strength and community.

names.name: Olga
names.origin: Of Slavic origin but accepted in Italy, popular in the 20th century.
names.meaning: Holy, widely referred to in Slavic cultures and adopted in Italy.

names.name: Quirina
names.origin: A feminine form of the name Quirinus, from ancient Roman tradition.
names.meaning: Spear bearer, reflecting strength and warrior spirit.

names.name: Renzo
names.origin: A diminutive of Lorenzo, popular in various parts of Italy.
names.meaning: Crowned with laurel, a symbol of victory and honor.

names.name: Sabrina
names.origin: Of uncertain origin, though often associated with the River Severn in Italy.
names.meaning: From the River Sabrina, symbolizing a flowing spirit.

names.name: Vladimir
names.origin: Of Slavic origin but also popular among Italians.
names.meaning: Renowned ruler, representing leadership and authority.

names.name: Alessandro
names.origin: An Italian form of the name Alexander, of Greek origin.
names.meaning: Defender of men, symbolizing strength and protection.

names.name: Marchesa
names.origin: Italian name reflecting nobility and elegance.
names.meaning: Marchioness, denoting a rank of nobility.

names.name: Cletus
names.origin: Greek origin, used in Italy since antiquity.

names.name: Ottilia
names.origin: Of Germanic origin, but increasingly popular in modern Italy.
names.meaning: Prosperous in battle, denoting strength and success.

names.name: Teresa
names.origin: Greek origins, popularized in Italy through saints.
names.meaning: Harvest, representative of abundance and hard work.

names.name: Xenia
names.origin: Of Greek origin, occasionally found in Italian contexts.

names.name: Zelinda
names.origin: A modern Italian name possibly derived from elements meaning 'heaven' and 'beautiful'.
